name: VCBBoardSizeModifier
description: Resize the Virtual Circuit Board board past the default 2048x2048. Adds a toolbar 'Board' button opening a small window with Width/Height fields and an Apply button. VCB boards are square, so a resize makes a side x side board (2048-8192); existing content is preserved. Compatible with the VCB Multiplayer mod - a resize is mirrored to the other player when a session is live.
